title: Vietnam, November 2025
city: Ho Chi Minh City · Mui Ne
description: From the endless energy of Ho Chi Minh City to the vast, wind-swept dunes of Mui Ne.

photo.caption: Ben Thanh Market, the oldest and most iconic market in Ho Chi Minh City.

photos.caption: The endless flow of traffic on the city streets.
A minor bump on the road. Just a small part of the journey.

photo.caption: So many hidden gems here. A perfect spot for a quiet coffee before exploring the bookstore downstairs.

blocks.quote: A city that never sleeps, but always dreams.
blocks.body: Ho Chi Minh City is a river of life. The streets are loud, fast, and full of color. But in the middle of all this beautiful chaos, you can always find a quiet corner to sit, breathe, and just watch the world go by.

photos.caption: Night views and good drinks at Landmark 81 with friends.

photo.caption: War Remnants Museum. A heavy reminder. Hoping for a world without war. RIP.

photos.caption: The unique, vast desert landscapes of Mui Ne.
Cute, round basket boats resting at the local fishing village.
Ho Chi Minh City Museum of Fine Arts

blocks.quote: Where the wind draws lines in the sand.
blocks.body: Leaving the busy city behind, Mui Ne feels like a different world. The air is warm, the rhythm is slow, and the golden sand stretches out under the open sky. It is a place to walk slowly and feel the sun on your skin.

photos.caption: Brightly painted jeeps waiting to take travelers across the dunes.
A local dog showing off a funny, toothy grin for the camera.
The slow and comforting pace of village life.
Walking along the famous Red Sand Dunes.
